summary: A collection of LinkedIn activity from Fei-Fei Li, primarily highlighting her recent work with World Labs on 3D world generation and spatial intelligence. She emphasizes 3D as a universal interface for human-machine interaction and advocates for building unbounded digital worlds that match human imagination.

principles.statement: 3D is a universal interface for machines and people.
principles.rationale: Just as code serves as a foundational medium for software, 3D environments provide a shared, universal medium for humans and AI to interact, generate, and simulate spaces.
principles.source_quote: Just like codes, 3D is a universal interface for machines and people.

principles.statement: The digital worlds we create should be as unbounded as our imaginations.
principles.rationale: AI tools for world-building should empower creators to generate expansive, limitless environments that reflect the scale of human creativity.
principles.source_quote: Our imaginations are unbounded, so should the worlds we create be…

mental_models.name: 3D as a Universal Interface
mental_models.description: Viewing 3D spatial environments not just as visual outputs, but as a fundamental communication layer (akin to code or text) that allows humans and machines to collaboratively generate, edit, and simulate reality.
mental_models.example: Using 3D spatial intelligence tools at World Labs to allow both humans and AI to interact with and understand physical spaces.

signature_quotes.text: Our imaginations are unbounded, so should the worlds we create be…
signature_quotes.context: Commenting on the ability of World Labs' models to generate massive, explorable 3D environments from a single image.

signature_quotes.text: Just like codes, 3D is a universal interface for machines and people.
signature_quotes.context: Sharing an essay about 3D becoming the universal interface for space, succeeding text as the interface for software.
